raw_input: Write a 150-word explanation of KV cache in transformer inference for a strong software engineer who has never implemented an LLM. Make it precise, concrete, and free of hand-waving. Use at most one analogy. Do not define 'transformer' or 'attention' from scratch — assume those are known.
success_criteria: explains what is cached (K and V projections per layer per token)
explains why (avoid recomputing for previous tokens)
mentions the memory/quality tradeoff or context length limit
constraints: no filler openings like 'Sure, here is…'
